input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.7.3
            TITLE: the electronic throttle and fuel injector/ignition system shutdown must stay active until the

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.7.3: The electronic throttle and fuel injector/ignition system shutdown must stay active until the
IC.4.7.3 The electronic throttle and fuel injector/ignition system shutdown must stay active until the 
TPS signals indicate the throttle is at or below the unpowered default position for one second 
or longer.

final_answer: The electronic throttle and fuel injector/ignition system shutdown must stay active until the TPS signals indicate the throttle is at or below the unpowered default position for one second or longer.
